a:r.a:t: Development and strategic expansion of the cybersecurity business area, including portfolio design, service offering creation, and market positioning.
Definition and structuring of modular consulting services across compliance (e.g., ISO 27001, NIS2, TISAX), risk management, and technical security domains.
Preparation and execution of pitches, proposals, and tenders for national and international clients across various industries.
Close alignment with sales, delivery, and technical experts to ensure feasibility, scalability, and value-based pricing of cybersecurity solutions.
Enablement of internal teams through training, method development, and the establishment of reusable assets and best-practice frameworks.
Design of marketing materials, value propositions, and customer journey concepts for security services.
Coordination with corporate strategy to align cybersecurity growth with enterprise goals and industry trends (e.g., digital sovereignty, cloud transformation, AI trust & resilience
Strategic and operational development of the consulting division with a focus on project management, business continuity, risk management, compliance, and portfolio
for the technical and disciplinary leadership of cross-functional teams ranging
Tasks include capacity planning, skills development, and performance management across multiple locations and projects.
Development and implementation of service delivery models, quality standards, and scalable consulting methodologies.
Support in recruiting, onboarding, and mentoring of new consultants.
Alignment of service offerings with client demands, market trends, and regulatory
collaboration with executive leadership in defining strategic goals, driving growth initiatives, and shaping the future direction of the business unit
Design and rollout of IT service and support concept across Audi and VW brands.
Defined handover points between processes and documents across shared software components (new and legacy systems).
Applied methods and standards: ITIL, LCM.
Project lead for the rollout of the
Portal in preparation for EURO VI documentation requirements.

Applied methods and standards: ITIL, Kanban.
IT Service Continuity Management Role enablement

Provided targeted coaching and capability building for process owners in IT Service Continuity Management (ITSCM). Guided stakeholders in understanding their roles, responsibilities, and key process interfaces, enabling them to effectively plan, maintain, and execute continuity measures.
